LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT HAPPENING HOUSE VENTURES, DAVID SMITH MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES. GRANTED. THE WORK PERFORMED WAS REASONABLE AND NECESSARY, AND THE BILLING RATES ARE COMMENSURATE WITH FEES CHARGED BY OTHER SAN FRANCISCO LAW FIRMS. DEFENDANT SMITH IS AWARDED $180,981 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND $6,471.56 IN COSTS WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR MAKING A PROPER MOTION TO STAY. MOTION TO STAY WILL BE FILED BY NOVEMBER 17, 2010. MOTION TO BE HEARD ON DECEMBER 15, 2010. OPPOSITION DUE DECEMBER 1, 2010 AND REPLY DUE ON DECEMBER 8, 2010. ENFORCEMENT OF THE FEES STAYED UNTIL THE HEARING ON THE MOTION TO STAY. REPLY DECLARATION OF FRANK A. CIALONE IN SUPPORT OF DEFTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLTF'S THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION UNDER THE ANTI-SLAPP FILED BY DEFENDANT HAPPENING HOUSE VENTURES SMITH, DAVID E

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT HAPPENING HOUSE VENTURES, AND DAVID SMITH'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION UNDER THE ANTI SLAPP STATE (CCP 425.16). ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION UNDER THE ANTI SLAPP STATUTE (CCP 425.16) IS DENIED. THE GRAVAMEN OF THE THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION IS THAT DEFENDANT MISMANAGED PLAINTIFF AND HAPPENING HOUSE VENTURES AND ENGAGED IN SELF-DEALINGS. THE ALLEGATIONS THAT ARE SUBJECT OF THIS MOTION ARE INCIDENTAL TO THOSE CAUSES OF ACTION. REQUEST FOR FEES DENIED. THE MOTION WAS NOT FRIVOLOUS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: ROSE M. MILLER, CSR #5041

Notice Of Motion For Stay Of Order Awarding Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Jan-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER HAIGHT ASHBURY FREE CLINICS, INC'S MOTION FOR STAY OF ORDER AWARDING ATTORNEYS' FEES. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/AJR) Judge: A. James Robertson, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion For Stay Of Order Awarding Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Continued To Jan-28-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Frank Cialone, Esq. of Shartsis Friese, 415-421-6500 for respondents and moving parties HAPPENING HOUSE VENTURES, DAVID SMITH
William Alderman, Esq. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe, 415-773-5944 for petitioner and opposing party Haight Ashbury Free Clinics, Inc.

RULING:
Argued and the Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling:
RESPONDENT HAPPENING HOUSE VENTURES, DAVID SMITH MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES. GRANTED. THE WORK PERFORMED WAS REASONABLE AND NECESSARY, AND THE BILLING RATES ARE COMMENSURATE WITH FEES CHARGED BY OTHER SAN FRANCISCO LAW FIRMS. DEFENDANT SMITH IS AWARDED $180,981 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND $6,471.56 IN COSTS WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR MAKING A PROPER MOTION TO STAY. MOTION TO STAY WILL BE FILED BY NOVEMBER 17, 2010. MOTION TO BE HEARD ON DECEMBER 15, 2010. OPPOSITION DUE DECEMBER 1, 2010 AND REPLY DUE ON DECEMBER 8, 2010. ENFORCEMENT OF THE FEES STAYED UNTIL THE HEARING ON THE MOTION TO STAY. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Pltf'S Third And Fourth Causes Of Action Under The Anti Slapp Statute (Ccp 425.16)
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT HAPPENING HOUSE VENTURES, and DAVID SMITH'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Third and Fourth Causes of Action under the Anti Slapp State (CCP 425.16).Appearances: William F. Alderman, Esq. of Orrick, (415) 773-5944, appearing for Petitioner and opposing party; Frank A. Cialone, Esq. of Shartsis Friese LLP, (415) 421-6500 appearing for Respondent Happening House Ventures, and David Smith, and moving party; Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Third And Fourth Causes Of Action Under The Anti Slapp Statute (CCP 425.16) is denied. The gravamen of the third and fourth causes of action is that defendant mismanaged plaintiff and Happening House Ventures and engaged in self-dealings. The allegations that are subject of this motion are incidental to those causes of action. Request for fees denied. The motion was not frivolous. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWWPB) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Rose M. Miller, CSR 5041
